message.reasoning:
We need to respond with JSON only according to contract. We are in "think" stage? We need to decide next action. The active code window shows artifacts.rs with many symbols. The graph frontier recommends expand_file for artifacts.rs. We need to issue a tool call. The appropriate tool is session.expand_file@v1. Payload must include target selector. Which selector? Likely the file path: "crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs". Use short id? The short ids are like F1 etc. The graph shows [F1] crate...artifact.rs --exports--> symbols... So maybe the selector for file is something like "file:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs"? But format for session.expand_file expects target selector string. Probably use the logical_key or file path. Use "crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs". Provide payload with target selector.

Thus kind: tool_call, tool_call tool_name "session.expand_file@v1". payload: {"target":"crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs"} maybe also other optional fields? Not required. We'll include minimal.

Also acquired_fact_ids: we may have none yet. readiness_state: "evidence_visible"? Actually after expand_file we will get evidence. But we haven't called yet, so readiness still not ready? The contract: readiness_state can be "not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit". Since we haven't got evidence yet, maybe "not_ready". But we are going to make a tool call, so readiness maybe "evidence_visible"? Hmm. The contract says when kind is tool_call, we must include tool_call and acquired_fact_ids (maybe empty) and readiness_state. Probably "not_ready". Let's set readiness_state: "not_ready". assistant_message: brief status like "queuing expand_file for artifacts.rs". Provide JSON.

Thus output:

{
  "kind":"tool_call",
  "assistant_message":"queuing expand_file for artifacts.rs",
  "tool_call":{"tool_name":"session.expand_file@v1","payload":{"target":"crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs"}},
  "acquired_fact_ids":[],
  "readiness_state":"not_ready"
}

Make sure no extra fields. No markdown.
